---
title: "Gyu H. Kim's Homepage"
---

## About

Assistant Professor

[Department of Economics and Finance](https://economicsfinance.kmu.ac.kr/sites/economicsfinance/index.do)

[Keimyung University](https://kmu.ac.kr/uni/eng/main.jsp)

My research focuses on international economics, climate policy, economic modeling, and applied microeconometrics.

---

## Contact

- Email: [gyu.kim@kmu.ac.kr](mailto:gyu.kim@kmu.ac.kr)
- Affiliation: Keimyung University, Daegu, South Korea
